attempts.reflection: You need to prioritize crafting basic items like sticks and wooden pickaxes before attempting more complex tasks. Specifically, craft 4 sticks from oak logs (Step 16) and then craft a wooden pickaxe (Step 17). Use the wooden pickaxe to mine cobblestone (Step 7) and redstone ore (Steps 11 and 18). Once you have the redstone ore, you can craft the redstone torch directly. Avoid repeating actions like mining oak logs multiple times without progressing to crafting tools and resources needed for later steps.

attempts.reflection: You repeatedly tried to craft sticks and oak planks without having enough oak logs, which led to a loop. Additionally, you missed crafting a furnace to smelt iron ingots needed for an iron pickaxe. To fix this, ensure you have at least one oak log before crafting any planks or sticks. Also, prioritize crafting a furnace as soon as possible to obtain an iron pickaxe, which is necessary for mining redstone ore. Correctly order your actions by first obtaining the required materials and tools before attempting more complex crafts.
